title: They Made $0 for 4 Years. Then Built a $22B Startup | The Kalshi Story
summary: Kalshi, founded by Tarek Mansour and Luana Lopes Lara, built a regulated financial exchange for predicting real-world events after years of regulatory battles and a lawsuit against its overseeing government agency. The startup grew from zero revenue in its first four years to billions in trading volume and a $22 billion valuation, positioning prediction markets as a tool for price discovery rather than gambling.
